debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G u v inst✝ p) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G u v inst✝ p) + 1

proof:
have start_mem_support : ∀ {a b : V} (q : G.LoopWalk a b), a ∈ q.support := by
    intro a b q; cases q with
    | nil => simp [support]
    | cons h p => simp [support]
    | loop p => simp [support]
  have dart_endpoints_mem_support : ∀ {a b : V} (q : G.LoopWalk a b),
      ∀ d ∈ q.darts, d.1 ∈ q.support ∧ d.2 ∈ q.support := by
    intro a b q
    induction q with
    | nil => simp [darts]
    | @cons u' v' w' h p ih =>
      intro d hd
      simp only [darts] at hd
      cases hd with
      | head => exact ⟨List.mem_cons_self .., List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (start_mem_support p)⟩
      | tail _ hd =>
        have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := ih d hd
        exact ⟨List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h1, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h2⟩
    | @loop u' v' p ih =>
      intro d hd
      simp only [darts] at hd
      cases hd with
      | head => exact ⟨List.mem_cons_self .., List.mem_cons_self ..⟩
      | tail _ hd =>
        have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := ih d hd
        exact ⟨List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h1, List.mem_cons_of_mem _ h2⟩
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | @cons u' v' w' h p ih =>
    have hsup : supportSet (LoopWalk.cons h p) = insert u' (supportSet p) := by
      simp [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons]
    have hedge : edgeSet (LoopWalk.cons h p) = insert (dartEdge (u', v')) (edgeSet p) := by
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [hsup, hedge]
    by_cases hu : u' ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      calc (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 := ih
        _ ≤ (insert (dartEdge (u', v')) (edgeSet p)).card + 1 := by
            apply Nat.add_le_add_right
            exact Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem hu]
      have hue : dartEdge (u', v') ∉ edgeSet p := by
        simp only [edgeSet, List.mem_toFinset]
        intro hmem
        rw [edges, List.mem_map] at hmem
        obtain ⟨d, hd_mem, hd_eq⟩ := hmem
        have hd_supp := dart_endpoints_mem_support p d hd_mem
        rw [supportSet, List.mem_toFinset] at hu
        simp only [dartEdge] at hd_eq
        rw [Sym2.mk_eq_mk_iff] at hd_eq
        rcases hd_eq with ⟨rfl, _⟩ | ⟨_, rfl⟩
        · exact hu hd_supp.1
        · exact hu hd_supp.2
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem hue]
      omega
  | @loop u' v' p ih =>
    have hsup : supportSet (LoopWalk.loop p) = insert u' (supportSet p) := by
      simp [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons]
    have hedge : edgeSet (LoopWalk.loop p) = insert (dartEdge (u', u')) (edgeSet p) := by
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [hsup, hedge]
    have hu : u' ∈ supportSet p := by
      simp [supportSet, List.mem_toFinset]
      exact start_mem_support p
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    calc (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 := ih
      _ ≤ (insert (dartEdge (u', u')) (edgeSet p)).card + 1 := by
          apply Nat.add_le_add_right
          exact Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
successful_attempts:
have start_mem_support : ∀ {a b : V} (q : G.LoopWalk a b), a ∈ q.support := by
    intro a b q; cases q with
    | nil => simp [support]
    | cons h p => simp [support]
    | loop p => simp [support]
  have dart_endpoints_mem_support : ∀ {a b : V} (q : G.LoopWalk a b),

    intro a b q
    induction q with
    | nil => simp [darts]
    | @cons u' v' w' h p ih =>
      intro d hd
      simp only [darts] at hd
      cases hd with
      | head => exact ⟨List.mem_cons_self .., List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (start_mem_support p)⟩
      | tail _ hd =>
        have ⟨h1, h2⟩ := ih d hd

    | @loop u' v' p ih =>

  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | @cons u' v' w' h p ih =>
    have hsup : supportSet (LoopWalk.cons h p) = insert u' (supportSet p) := by

    have hedge : edgeSet (LoopWalk.cons h p) = insert (dartEdge (u', v')) (edgeSet p) := by

    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem hu]

        · exact hu hd_supp.2
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem hue]
      omega
  | @loop u' v' p ih =>
    have hsup : supportSet (LoopWalk.loop p) = insert u' (supportSet p) := by

    have hedge : edgeSet (LoopWalk.loop p) = insert (dartEdge (u', u')) (edgeSet p) := by

    rw [hsup, hedge]
    have hu : u' ∈ supportSet p := by

    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    calc (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 := ih
      _ ≤ (insert (dartEdge (u', u')) (edgeSet p)).card + 1 := by
          apply Nat.add_le_add_right
          exact Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
